title: rosa viscaria var. elatior
intro: Rosa viscaria var. elatior, also known as the Viscid Rose or Sticky Rose, is a variety of the Viscaria alpina plant, a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. elatior include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other minor health issues.
